# Ellatech

> Geneva-based program empowering women to transition into tech through digital upskilling, mentorship, and hands-on training.

Ellatech runs a career transition program for women in Geneva, Switzerland, focused on web development, data analysis, and AI/digital skills. The program combines training, mentorship, and partner placements.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Program overview, benefits, eligibility, timeline, and partners.
- [About](/about): Mission, story, and team behind Ellatech.
- [Apply](/apply): Application form for prospective candidates.
- [Become a Partner](/become-partner): Partnership form for companies and organizations.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How Ellatech handles personal data.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Terms governing use of the Ellatech site and program.
